package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `strings.Replace(..., -1)` instead of `strings.ReplaceAll(...)`.
type CaseStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceallDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceallModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceallRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceallModel
}

type CaseStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceallService struct {
    repo *CaseStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceallRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceallAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceall(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceallDTO) error {
    focus := "strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall_negative := map[string]int{"strings": 1, "replace": 2, "neg": 3, "one": 4, "replaceall": 5}
    strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    strings_negative_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = strings_negative_0
    replace_negative_1 := strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall_negative["replace"] + len(input)
    _ = replace_negative_1
    neg_negative_2 := strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall_negative["neg"] + len(input)
    _ = neg_negative_2
    one_negative_3 := strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall_negative["one"] + len(input)
    _ = one_negative_3
    replaceall_negative_4 := strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall_negative["replaceall"] + len(input)
    _ = replaceall_negative_4
    return nil
}
